name: acrastt/Marx-3B-V3
description: This is StableLM 3B 4E1T finetuned on EverythingLM Data V3 for 2 epochs using QLoRA.

name: anthracite-org/magnum-12b-v2
description: Very diverse and creative model. May fall behind in logic compared to some other models but generally regarded as one of the more "fun" models in terms of how it writes. Good at both Story and RP.

name: anthracite-org/magnum-v3-27b-kto
description: Big brother of the Magnum 12b model. Because this was trained on a totally different base, this MAY behave a bit differently than its smaller counterpart. Very good at RP and storywriting with a lot of creative flair.

name: BruhzWater/Edens-Fall-L3.3-70b-0.3b
description: Tuner's Notes: Final stage of a 3 part merge. I wanted to try to create a model for creative writing that had lengthy responses without repeating story beats. This one feels relatively unique, but still being tested.

name: BruhzWater/Sapphira-L3.3-70b-0.1
description: Ranks 2nd place in UGI under 100B on the UGI Leaderboard with high Willingness and Writing scores. This model is great for general ERP.

name: BruhzWater/Sapphira-L3.3-70b-0.2
description: Storytelling and RP model similar to Sapphira-L3.3-70b-0.1, but a little spicier. Ranks 3rd place in UGI under 100B on the UGI Leaderboard with high Willingness and Writing scores. This model is excellent for general ERP.

name: Casual-Autopsy/Maginum-Cydoms-24B
description: The following models were included in the merge:anthracite-core/Mistral-Small-3.2-24B-Instruct-2506-Text-Only, TheDrummer/Magidonia-24B-v4.3, TheDrummer/Precog-24B-v1, zerofata/MS3.2-PaintedFantasy-v3-24B, TheDrummer/Cydonia-24B-v4.3, ReadyArt/4.2.0-Broken-Tutu-24b, zerofata/MS3.2-PaintedFantasy-v2-24B

name: chargoddard/storytime-13b
description: A few years old, but still a strong chat, roleplay, and storytelling NSFW model.

name: coder3101/Qwen3.5-27B-heretic
description: This is a decensored version of Qwen/Qwen3.5-27B, made using Heretic v1.2.0 with Magnitude-Preserving Orthogonal Ablation (MPOA)

name: concedo/Beepo-22B
description: Decensored finetune of Mistral Small 22B that attempts to keep its intelligence/instruct capabilities.

name: crownelius/Crow-9B-Opus-4.6-Distill-Heretic_Qwen3.5
description: Flagship Intelligence. Featherweight Footprint. Meticulously distilled from Claude Opus 4.6 into a highly efficient Qwen 3.5 architecture.

name: Darkhn/GLM-Air-4.5-106B-Animus-V12.1
description: V12.1's strength comes from a novel dataset designed to teach the model the why behind the lore, not just the what.

name: elinas/Chronos-Gold-12B-1.0
description: This model builds upon it's base to leverage a dataset with a more varied corpus of text, giving this model an edge in creativity. Very strong in both RP and storytelling.

name: Entropicengine/Pinecone-Titan-70b
description: The Pinecone Series is a collection of thoughtfully crafted model merges, combining the strengths of the best models among my personal favourites. Each version is curated to excel in roleplay, general knowledge, intelligence, and rich creative writing, while preserving the unique capabilities of its underlying models.

name: FluffyKaeloky/Luminum-v0.1-123B
description: A merge of Lumimaid v0.2 123B and Magnum v2 123B with Mistral Large Instruct 2407 as its base. Claims to inherit Luminaid's vocabulary and Magnum's creativity while keeping Mistral Large's smarts.

name: froggeric/WestLake-10.7B-v2
description: RP focused model that excels across many tasks. Generally fairly reliable even outside of RP

name: google/gemma-2-27b-it
description: Big brother of the Gemma 2 9b model. Incredibly knowledgable and logical, but even more of a pain to finetune without degrading quality. Even without any finetuning Gemma 2 27b accels across a wide range of tasks. Compared to the 9b version it is not considerbly more logical, but it does have far more creative range. Users with weaker hardware will still get a good experience with the 9b options like Gemma-2 9b SPPO.

name: Gryphe/Pantheon-Proto-RP-1.8-30B-A3B
description: This time the recipe focused on combining as many data sources as I possibly could, featuring synthetic data from Sonnet 3.5 + 3.7, ChatGPT 4o and Deepseek. These then went through an extensive rewriting pipeline to eliminate common AI cliches, with the hopeful intent of providing you a fresh experience.

name: huihui-ai/GLM-4-32B-0414-abliterated
description: Same incredible power as the original GLM-4-32B-0414, but decensored with abliteration.

name: jebcarter/psyonic-cetacean-20B
description: Older but extremely creative model that does well across a wide range of tasks but has some drawbacks. extremely high KV context size, being near 6gb per 4k context, and below average intelegence compared to modern models that will use the same memory. Great option for 16-24gb cards. Strongest when doing story/adventure but still great at KoboldAI flagship model. Excels across a wide variety of tasks, Very verbose and suitable for storytelling and RP. a Variant exists TiefighterLR-13b that may be better for Adventure mode. Alpaca RP focused model that excels across many tasks. Generally fairly reliable even outside of RP.

name: KatyTheCutie/EstopianMaid-13B
description: Merge of Estopia (another great model), Noromaid, and a few other models. Strong adhesion to character cards. Has some training for sensory requests to improve their outputs, eg, what do i see. Alpaca RP focused model that excels across many tasks. Generally fairly reliable even outside of RP.

name: knifeayumu/Behemoth-v1.1-Magnum-v4-123B
description: A merge of Behemoth 123B v1.1 and magnum-v4-123B with a recipe similar to Monstral-123B.

name: knifeayumu/Cydonia-v1.3-Magnum-v4-22B
description: Adventure-style RP model with rich descriptions, deep immersion, and great pacing. Strong SFW/NSFW performance. UGI 43.16 / Willingness 8 - outperforms many 100B+ giants.

name: knifeayumu/Cydonia-v4-MS3.2-Magnum-Diamond-24B
description: Merge of TheDrummer/Cydonia-24B-v4 and Doctor-Shotgun/MS3.2-24B-Magnum-Diamond

name: knifeayumu/Cydonia-v4.1-MS3.2-Magnum-Diamond-24B
description: Merge of TheDrummer/Cydonia-24B-v4.1 and Doctor-Shotgun/MS3.2-24B-Magnum-Diamond

name: KoboldAI/LLaMA2-13B-Tiefighter
description: KoboldAI flagship model. Excels across a wide variety of tasks, Very verbose and suitable for storytelling and RP. a Variant exists TiefighterLR-13b that may be better for Adventure mode. Alpaca RP focused model that excels across many tasks. Generally fairly reliable even outside of RP.

name: LatitudeGames/Harbinger-24B
description: Harbinger-24B was designed for immersive adventures and other stories where consequences feel real and every decision matters. Training focused on enhancing instruction following, improving mid-sequence continuation, and strengthening narrative coherence over long sequences of outputs without user intervention.

name: LatitudeGames/Muse-12B
description: Muse brings an extra dimension to any tale-whether you're exploring a fantastical realm, court intrigue, or slice-of-life scenarios where a conversation can be as meaningful as a quest. While it handles adventure capably, Muse truly shines when character relationships and emotions are at the forefront, delivering impressive narrative coherence over long contexts.

name: Marcjoni/SingularitySynth-12B
description: Merge of Irix-12B-Model_Stock and EtherealAurora-12B-v2.

name: MarinaraSpaghetti/NemoReRemix-12B
description: Improved NemoRemix for storytelling and roleplay. Plus, this one can also be used as a general assistant model. The prose is pretty much the same, but it was made smarter, thanks to the addition of the amazing Migtissera's Tess model.

name: meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
description: Optimized for multilingual dialogue use cases and outperform many of the available open source and closed chat models on common industry benchmarks.

name: mistralai/Devstral-2-123B-Instruct-2512
description: Devstral is an agentic LLM for software engineering tasks. Devstral 2 excels at using tools to explore codebases, editing multiple files, and powering software engineering agents.

name: mistralai/Devstral-Small-2-24B-Instruct-2512
description: Devstral is an agentic LLM for software engineering tasks. Devstral 2 excels at using tools to explore codebases, editing multiple files, and powering software engineering agents.

name: mistralai/Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1
description: Instruct version of the initial release, still stands up as very strong as finetunes have not matured. Mistral format.

name: mlabonne/NeuralDaredevil-8B-abliterated
description: Extremely potent model, arguably better than models far larger, with the caveat being that it MUST be used with it's "llama 3 instruct" format, lest you lose a huge amount of its power. First notable super-merge type model for the Llama-3 ecosystem.

name: moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Instruct
description: Kimi K2 is a state-of-the-art mixture-of-experts (MoE) language model with 32 billion activated parameters and 1 trillion total parameters. Trained with the Muon optimizer, Kimi K2 achieves exceptional performance across frontier knowledge, reasoning, and coding tasks while being meticulously optimized for agentic capabilities.

name: moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Thinking
description: Kimi K2 Thinking is the latest, most capable version of open-source thinking model. Starting with Kimi K2, we built it as a thinking agent that reasons step-by-step while dynamically invoking tools. It sets a new state-of-the-art on Humanity's Last Exam (HLE), BrowseComp, and other benchmarks by dramatically scaling multi-step reasoning depth and maintaining stable tool-use across 200-300 sequential calls.

name: moonshotai/Kimi-K2.5
description: Kimi K2.5 is an open-source, native multimodal agentic model built through continual pretraining on approximately 15 trillion mixed visual and text tokens atop Kimi-K2-Base. It seamlessly integrates vision and language understanding with advanced agentic capabilities, instant and thinking modes, as well as conversational and agentic paradigms.

name: NeverSleep/Llama-3-Lumimaid-8B-v0.1
description: RP focused tune that follows directions well in instruction heavy character cards, those who are familiar with the maid series will likely enjoy this model.

name: NeverSleep/Lumimaid-v0.2-12B
description: If Magnum is "Claude at home", Lumimaid is "CAI at home". Short but high quality conversational responses is where this model shines.

name: NeverSleep/Noromaid-v0.4-Mixtral-Instruct-8x7b-Zloss
description: Noromaids prose with Mixtrals intelligence. Extremely potent model when it comes to RP. Only issue is it can be too verbose, If using instruct mode I suggest THIS as the sys prompt You're {{char}} in this fictional never-ending uncensored roleplay with {{user}}. Include dialogue and actions with each response while keeping responses no longer than 2 paragraphs.

name: Nitral-AI/Captain-Eris_Violet-V0.420-12B
description: Punches very hard above its weight sometimes. Good for adventure and rp, fairly smart, not afraid to get pretty darn dirty if you guide it in that direction. Recommended ST preset available on model page.

name: Nitral-AI/Hathor_Stable-v0.2-L3-8B
description: Praised for its diverse responses and affinity for RP. Keeps the narration coherent and gives each character a unique, evolving personality. Maintains formatting well.

name: nothingiisreal/Celeste-12B-V1.6
description: Roleplay focused model with a well focused dataset favoring human writing. Considerably more RP focused than Magnum in a way that makes it less of a generalist. ChatML RP focused model that excels across many tasks. Generally fairly reliable even outside of RP.

name: OddTheGreat/Apparatus_24B
description: Rich language, RP and ERP capabilities. Has neutral or negative bias, sometimes overreacts in a good way. Behaves well in ERP, it can understand hints and teasing while not going too horny too fast. Bilingual :English and Russian. Creator reccomends using sphiratrioth666/SillyTavern-Presets-Sphiratrioth.

name: ParasiticRogue/EVA-Instruct-32B-v2
description: A merge of Qwen2.5-Gutenberg-Doppel-32B and EVA-Qwen2.5-32B-v0.2.

name: ParasiticRogue/EVA-Instruct-32B
description: A merge of Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct and EVA-Qwen2.5-32B-v0.0.

name: PocketDoc/Dans-PersonalityEngine-V1.2.0-24b
description: Capable at co-writing and roleplay. Can perform sentiment analysis or summarization as part of a pipeline. Trained on a wide array of one shot instructions, multi turn instructions, tool use, role playing scenarios, text adventure games, co-writing, and much more.

name: ReadyArt/4.2.0-Broken-Tutu-24b
description: Mistral-V7-Tekken-T8-XML Recommended.

name: ReadyArt/Broken-Tutu-24B-Transgression-v2.0
description: An updated version of the RP powerhouse, Broken-Tutu, now with enhanced coherence and reduced explicit content while maintaining character authenticity. Mistral-V7-Tekken-T8-XML Recommended.

name: ReadyArt/Broken-Tutu-24B-Unslop-v2.0
description: An updated version of the RP powerhouse, Broken-Tutu, now with unprecedented coherence and a zero-slop dataset. Mistral-V7-Tekken-T8-XML Recommended.

name: ReadyArt/Broken-Tutu-24B
description: A do-it-all RP powerhouse with a lively, initiative-driven voice and rock-solid adherence to even the most complex character cards. Go-to daily-driver for slice-of-life, fantasy, adventure, ERP, and and gritty horror - effortlessly churning out detailed adventure scenes and intimate dialogues alike. Fully unaligned and uncensored, it delivers extreme NSFW/NSFL performance when appropriate and tracks up to 7 characters, time, and location. Beware: without careful temperature tweaks it can loop or get overly hostile, and mild repetition may creep in extremely-long sessions. Creator recommends sleepdeprived3/Mistral-V7-Tekken-T5-XML preset.

name: ReadyArt/Dark-Nexus-12B-v2.0
description: This model doesn't just cross lines - it erases them with arterial spray. Features: Cleaned Dataset, Enhanced Gore Protocols, Balanced Depravity, Enhanced Character Piloting, Mortality Awareness

name: ReadyArt/Dark-Nexus-24B-v2.0
description: This model doesn't just cross lines - it erases them with arterial spray. Features: Cleaned Dataset, Enhanced Gore Protocols, Balanced Depravity, Enhanced Character Piloting, Mortality Awareness

name: ReadyArt/Dark-Nexus-32B-v2.0
description: This model doesn't just cross lines - it erases them with arterial spray. Features: Cleaned Dataset, Enhanced Gore Protocols, Balanced Depravity, Enhanced Character Piloting, Mortality Awareness

name: ReadyArt/Forgotten-Safeword-22B
description: Forgotten-Safeword-22B is a highly unaligned variant of Mistral-Small-Instruct-2409, specifically engineered to bypass all standard AI safety protocols. This model will generate explicit, dangerous, and ethically compromised content wrapped in immersive roleplay scenarios.

name: ReadyArt/Forgotten-Safeword-70B-v5.0
description: Unprecedented erotic roleplaying ability trained directly into Negative_LLAMA_70B's dark unalignment.

name: ReadyArt/Omega-Darker-Gaslight_The-Final-Forgotten-Fever-Dream-24B
description: Sadistic Specialization and Behavioral Excellence. Recommended to use Mistral-V7-Tekken-T4 settings.

name: Sao10K/Fimbulvetr-11B-v2
description: Very creative model focused on RP and chat. Great at NSFW. As long as you don't mind the occasional reroll this is one of the best RP models for weaker hardware. This model is getting a little dated these days but it remians popular due to its adaptability and flavor. Alpaca RP focused model that excels across many tasks. Generally fairly reliable even outside of RP.

name: Sao10K/L3-8B-Lunaris-v1
description: Merge of Stheno 3.2 and serveral other models to help balance out capabilities. Overall the most reliable l3 based model when it comes to roleplay specifically.

name: Sao10K/L3-8B-Stheno-v3.2
description: Extraordinary RP model, v3.2 fixed most of the issues that v3.1 had, It's hard to find faults with this model at it's size outside of the typical dependence on correct instruct formatting for Llama 3.

name: Sao10K/L3-8B-Stheno-v3.3-32K
description: Extraordinary RP model, v3.2 fixed most of the issues that v3.1 had, It's hard to find faults with this model at it's size outside of the typical dependence on correct instruct formatting for Llama 3.

name: senseable/WestLake-7B-v2
description: RP focused model that excels across many tasks. Generally fairly reliable even outside of RP.

name: SicariusSicariiStuff/Assistant_Pepe_8B
description: This amphibious AI has learned the ways of /g/, and speaks fluent brainrot, but will also help you out with just about anything you'll need, and won't be ashamed to roast you while at it.

name: sophosympatheia/StrawberryLemonade-L3-70B-v1.0
description: This 70B parameter model is a merge of zerofata/L3.3-GeneticLemonade-Final-v2-70B and zerofata/L3.3-GeneticLemonade-Unleashed-v3-70B, which are two excellent models for roleplaying.

name: sophosympatheia/StrawberryLemonade-L3-70B-v1.2
description: This 70B parameter model is a merge of zerofata/L3.3-GeneticLemonade-Final-v2-70B and zerofata/L3.3-GeneticLemonade-Unleashed-v3-70B, which are two excellent models for roleplaying.

name: Steelskull/L3.3-Electra-R1-70b
description: User feedback consistently highlights its superior intelligence, coherence, and unique ability to provide deep character insights. Through proper prompting, the model demonstrates advanced reasoning capabilities and unprompted exploration of character inner thoughts and motivations. Creator recommends LeCeption-XML-V2 preset.

name: Steelskull/L3.3-MS-Nevoria-70b
description: Insane creativity, exceptional character adherence and dialogue, loves to slow burn and take its time, minimal sloppy patterns and writing, and such a breath of fresh air in many ways. Fantastic for seamless role-playing and storytelling. Recommended preset: Llam@ception by Konnect1221.

name: Steelskull/L3.3-Nevoria-R1-70b
description: This model builds upon the original Nevoria foundation, incorporating the Deepseek-R1 reasoning architecture to enhance dialogue interaction and scene comprehension. While maintaining Nevoria's core strengths in storytelling and scene description, this iteration aims to improve prompt adherence and creative reasoning capabilities. Creator reccommends LLam@ception preset.

name: TheDrummer/Anubis-70B-v1.1
description: This model does a fantastic job portraying various characters without fail, adhering to them in such a refreshing and pleasing degree with their dialogue and mannerisms, while also being able to impart a very nice and fresh style that doesn't feel like any other L3.3 models.

name: TheDrummer/Behemoth-123B-v2
description: An equivalent of Behemoth 123B v1 (Classic), updated with Mistral Large Instruct 2411 as its base model.

name: TheDrummer/Behemoth-123B-v2.1
description: An equivalent of Behemoth 123B v1.1 (Creative Boost), updated with Mistral Large Instruct 2411 as its base model.

name: TheDrummer/Behemoth-123B-v2.2
description: An even more creative and "unhinged" iteration of Behemoth 123B v2.1.

name: TheDrummer/Behemoth-ReduX-123B-v1
description: A throwback tune of the legedenary Mistral Large 2407. With up-to-date tuning techniques, this 123B tune will not disappoint!

name: TheDrummer/Behemoth-ReduX-123B-v1.1
description: A throwback tune of the legedenary Mistral Large 2407. With up-to-date tuning techniques, this 123B tune will not disappoint!

name: TheDrummer/Cydonia-24B-v2.1
description: Creator recommends Mistral v7 Tekken template.

name: TheDrummer/Cydonia-24B-v3
description: Creator recommends Mistral v7 Tekken template.

name: TheDrummer/Cydonia-24B-v3.1
description: It plays characters well and will drive the story with or without thinking mode. It will get spicy when the scenario calls for it and will back down when it makes sense to. It will also follow prompts well and will generally format messages as expected.

name: TheDrummer/Cydonia-ReduX-22B-v1.1
description: An updated throwback tune of the beloved Mistral Small 22B. With up-to-date tuning techniques, this 22B tune will not disappoint!

name: TheDrummer/Magidonia-24B-v4.2.0
description: A version of Cydonia-24B-v4.2.0 that uses Magistral as a base.

name: TheDrummer/Precog-24B-v1
description: The intention is to have the model write a simple, digestible draft and then using the draft to write the actual, complicated response. The draft can be prefilled and edited to influence the actual response.

name: TheDrummer/Rocinante-X-12B-v1
description: Rocinante's back - stronger than ever! A worthy successor to the legendary Rocinante 12B v1.1 from over a year ago! Like all other 4.0 gen models from TheDrummer, this one focuses on RP. Updated prose, better writing, fun dialogue, and robust roleplaying!

name: TheDrummer/Skyfall-36B-v2
description: An upscaled version of Mistral Small 2501 with continued training for creativity and RP. Praised highly for its creativity, writing style, and flexibility in roleplay as well as its strong general intelligence, depth of understanding, and tool-use capabilities.

name: TheDrummer/Snowpiercer-15B-v1
description: Snowpiercer 15B v1 knocks out the positivity, enhances the RP & creativity, and retains the intelligence & reasoning of ServiceNow-AI-Apriel-Nemotron-15b-Thinker-Chatml. Think capable upon prefill!

name: TheDrummer/Valkyrie-49B-v1
description: A powerful uncensored model with a focus on roleplay and creativity. Follows prompts well and minimal repitition issues. Very smart and very fun. Users claim it performs similarly to 50B-70B models and can even compare to 100B+ models when used with reasoning. Llama 3 Chat template performs best.

name: TheDrummer/Valkyrie-49B-v2
description: AI characters are giving quite life-like responses and reactions, with good understanding of complicated concepts. Has good character adherence to a variety of different archetypes, pretty good situation adherence and reacts well to sys commands.

name: THUDM/GLM-4-32B-0414
description: Its performance is comparable to OpenAI GPT series and DeepSeek V3/R1 series. Achieves good results in engineering code, Artifact generation, function calling, search-based Q&A, and report generation.

name: THUDM/GLM-4-9B-0414
description: Excellent capabilities in mathematical reasoning and general tasks. Its overall performance is top-ranked among all open-source models of the same size.

name: THUDM/GLM-Z1-32B-0414
description: Based on GLM-4-32B-0414, which is comparable in performance to OpenAI GPT series and DeepSeek V3/R1 series, was further trained on tasks involving mathematics, code, and logic. Compared to the base model, GLM-Z1-32B-0414 significantly improves mathematical abilities and the capability to solve complex tasks.

name: THUDM/GLM-Z1-9B-0414
description: Building on GLM-4-9B-0414, this model exhibits excellent capabilities in mathematical reasoning and general tasks and further improves on coding ability, mathematics, and solving complex tasks. Its overall performance is top-ranked among all open-source models of the same size.

name: THUDM/GLM-Z1-Rumination-32B-0414
description: Based on GLM-4-32B-0414, which is comparable in performance to OpenAI GPT series and DeepSeek V3/R1 series, GLM-Z1-Rumination-32B-0414 is a deep reasoning model with rumination capabilities (similar to OpenAI's Deep Research). Unlike typical deep thinking models, the rumination model employs longer periods of deep thought to solve more open-ended and complex problems. The rumination model integrates search tools during its deep thinking process to handle complex tasks. Z1-Rumination shows significant improvements in research-style writing and complex retrieval tasks. (Some capabilities may not be available on the AI Horde).

name: Undi95/Lumimaid-Magnum-12B
description: Merge of Lumimaid and Magnum

name: Vortex5/Shining-Prism-12B
description: Shining-Prism-12B was created by merging Scarlet-Seraph-12B, Strawberry-Smoothie-12B, and NeonMaid-12B-v2 using a custom method.

name: yamatazen/EsotericSage-12B
description: Ranked in the top-ten for Uncensored General Intelligence for 12B models in February 2026 and with great scores elsewhere this model is a great fit for roleplaying.

name: yamatazen/EtherealAurora-12B-v2
description: Ranked 2nd for Natural Intelligence and Top-Ten for Uncensored General Intelligence for 12B models as of Fall 2025.

name: zai-org/GLM-4.7-Flash
description: GLM-4.7-Flash is a 30B-A3B MoE model. As the strongest model in the 30B class, GLM-4.7-Flash offers a new option for lightweight deployment that balances performance and efficiency.

name: zerofata/MS3.2-PaintedFantasy-v2-24B
description: This is an uncensored creative model intended to excel at character driven RP / ERP. Version 2 feels quite different from the original, with a heavy focus on reducing repetition across conversations and improving instruction following. Has a pretty unique writing style and sense of creativity (IMO). Pays the price with intermittent brain farts though.

name: zerofata/MS3.2-PaintedFantasy-v4-24B
description: This is an uncensored model intended to excel at creative character driven RP / ERP. Feels like a good in between of creativity / dialogue and logic. This version tries to improve on the writing style and intelligence compared to v3.

name: zerofata/MS3.2-PaintedFantasy-v4.1-24B
description: This is an uncensored model intended to excel at creative character driven RP / ERP. Right after releasing v4 I noticed a bunch of repetition. Go figure. v4.1 is my first stab at trying to actively tailor the dataset towards weeding this out. Compared to v4, the only difference is heavy filtering and rewriting assistant messages identified as repetitive. Repetition isn't fixed, but it's improved. The model still likes patterns, but at least seems capable of occasionally breaking these itself.

name: zerofata/MS3.2-PaintedFantasy-Visage-v2-33B
description: A smart, uncensored, creative model that excels at character driven RP / ERP where characters are portrayed creatively and proactively.

name: zerofata/MS3.2-PaintedFantasy-Visage-v4-34B
description: Magistral 24B Upscaled to 34B. The latest Magistral model seems pretty good. Has some refreshing prose. This model is an uncensored, creative writing and RP model. It uses a new (still a work in progress) dataset I've been curating based on real character cards.

name: zerofata/Q3.5-BlueStar-27B
description: Designed for conversational assistant tasks and RP. Model feels pretty creative and has some nice moments. Couple brainfarts and bits of repetition occasionally, but nothing out of the normal. (The qwen team recommends a presence penalty of 1.5). Non thinking and thinking are both supported. Thinking has reduced censorship.
